name: Dub-It
description: Translate a video's audio into another language and dub it back over the original picture. Pre-flights with the SDK source_review (D2.3), then runs extract → transcribe → translate → TTS → mux as four pluggable steps so the host can swap stub backends for production providers.

description_i18n.zh: 把视频的语音翻译到目标语言并重新配音叠回原视频。流程：先用 SDK source_review (D2.3) 做 ffprobe 体检，再依次执行 抽音 → 转写 → 翻译 → TTS → 混音，每一步都是可插拔的，便于主程序替换为生产实现。
description_i18n.en: Translate a video's audio into another language and dub it back over the original picture. Pre-flights with the SDK source_review (D2.3), then runs extract → transcribe → translate → TTS → mux as four pluggable steps so the host can swap stub backends for production providers.

author: OpenAkita
